service: agentic-kpi-api

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: us-east-1
  stage: prod
  environment:
    NODE_ENV: production
    AWS_REGION_NAME: us-east-1
    BEDROCK_MODEL_ID: us.anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022-v2:0
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - bedrock:InvokeModel
          Resource: "*"

functions:
  api:
    handler: dist/lambda.handler
    timeout: 30
    memorySize: 512
    events:
      - http:
          path: /{proxy+}
          method: ANY
          cors: true
      - http:
          path: /
          method: ANY
          cors: true

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

package:
  patterns:
    - '!node_modules/**'
    - '!src/**'
    - 'dist/**'
    - 'node_modules/**'

/Users/devesh.b.sharma/Astra Zeneca/agen.serviceRawFile:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
Description: Agentic KPI Assistant API

Globals:
  Function:
    Timeout: 90
    MemorySize: 1024
    Runtime: nodejs20.x

Resources:
  KpiApiFunction:
    Type: AWS::Serverless::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: agentic-kpi-api
      Handler: dist/lambda.handler
      CodeUri: .
      Environment:
        Variables:
          NODE_ENV: production
          AWS_REGION_NAME: us-east-1
          BEDROCK_MODEL_ID: us.anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022-v2:0
      Policies:
        - Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Action:
                - bedrock:InvokeModel
              Resource: "*"
      Events:
        Api:
          Type: Api
          Properties:
            Path: /{proxy+}
            Method: ANY
            RestApiId: !Ref KpiApi
        Root:
          Type: Api
          Properties:
            Path: /
            Method: ANY
            RestApiId: !Ref KpiApi

  KpiApi:
    Type: AWS::Serverless::Api
    Properties:
      Name: agentic-kpi-api
      StageName: prod
      Cors:
        AllowOrigin: "'*'"
        AllowHeaders: "'Content-Type,Authorization'"
        AllowMethods: "'GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS'"

Outputs:
  ApiUrl:
    Description: API Gateway URL
    Value: !Sub "https://${KpiApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod"
